core.services package¶

Submodules¶

core.services.activity_services module¶

class core.services.activity_services.ActivityServices(db_manager)[source]¶

Bases: object

Service layer for managing vacation activities.

Provides validation and delegates database operations to DatabaseManager.

add_activity(vacation_id, day, start_time, end_time, activity, location, notest)[source]¶

Adds a new activity to a vacation itinerary with validation. Returns:

tuple[bool, str | None]: (Success flag, Error message if any)

delete_activity(activity_id)[source]¶

Deletes an activity with validation.

Returns:

tuple[bool, str | None]: (Success flag, Error message if any)

get_activities(vacation_id, day)[source]¶

Retrieves all activities for a specific vacation day.

update_activity(activity_id, start_time, end_time, activity, location, notest)[source]¶

Updates an existing activity with validation.

core.services.location_services module¶

class core.services.location_services.LocationServices[source]¶

Bases: object

get_destination(destination)[source]¶

core.services.task_services module¶

class core.services.task_services.TaskServices(db_manager)[source]¶

Bases: object

Handles all business logic for tasks. Interacts with the database but knows nothing about the UI.

add_habit(title, goal)[source]¶

Adds a new habit to the database with validation.

Returns:

tuple[bool, str | None]: (Success flag, Error message if any)

add_task(title, date)[source]¶

Adds a new task to the database.

delete_habit(habit_id)[source]¶

Deletes (deactivates) a habit.

delete_task(task_id)[source]¶

Deletes a task from the database.

get_habits(week_start)[source]¶

Retrieves all habits and their weekly logs.

get_tasks_by_date(date)[source]¶

Retrieves tasks for a specific date.

mark_task_done(task_id)[source]¶

Marks a task as completed.

mark_task_in_progress(task_id)[source]¶

Marks a task as in progress.

toggle_day(habit_id, day)[source]¶

Toggles the completion status of a habit for a specific day.

core.services.vacation_services module¶

class core.services.vacation_services.VacationServices(db_manager)[source]¶

Bases: object

Service layer for managing vacations.

Handles validation and delegates database operations for vacations. Also integrates LocationServices for location-related functionality.

add_vacation(destination, start_date, end_date)[source]¶

Adds a new vacation with validation.

Returns:

tuple[bool, str | None]: (Success flag, Error message if validation fails)

get_vacations()[source]¶

Retrieves all vacations from the database.

Personal Planner
